primerTitle: Mixed question bank — how to use it
primer:
## Mixed question bank
A large mixed bank to **rehearse out loud** across the whole quant/data/risk screen — probability & statistics, econometrics, risk, regulation, modelling and Python/R/SAS, in one place.
- **Interview question bank** — 150 multiple-choice + 10 open-ended questions; flip for an explained answer and sources.

Use it for breadth and rehearsal; the focused decks (econometrics, time series, risk & markets, data handling) drill each area in depth.
